summary: Completed source-backed agent audit and repaired critical backend task-pull policy blocking, CLI terminal writeback resilience, agent UI subagent status rendering, Devpilot web execution-governance/logs UI routing, and UI E2E fixtures.

applied_findings: Command policy is evaluated before claimed command steps are returned.
Online runtime identity mismatch now prevents a different agent/runner from claiming work for the same server.
Policy-blocked claim jobs are written with ownership and running-state guards and preserve existing metadata.
Policy-blocked claim jobs now call finish sync so linked business runs are not stranded.
Post-claim execution exceptions now best-effort finish the claimed task as failed or cancelled.
Finish writeback transport failures now produce a structured summary instead of throwing away the run result.
Execution governance page now delegates to the URL-scope-aware content component.
Logs policy panels now mount the Agent Follow card.
Subagent failed/error/cancelled/pending statuses no longer render as completed.

invest_subagents.scope: agent docs, process, and e2e validation inventory
applied_findings: Devpilot UI E2E fixtures now include an agent-follow log stream and entries so screenshots exercise the repaired card.
S028 board/result/verification evidence is recorded separately from the earlier external-signoff pack.

resolved_findings: Policy-blocked claims now sync linked business runs.
Policy-blocked claim writeback now uses guarded updateMany and metadata merge.
ChatMessage.tsx large Prettier churn was reverted to a minimal 4-line diff.

residual_followups: Queue worker versus task-pull race, heartbeat cadence tuning, abortable CLI HTTP, unbounded payload limits, and agent-app subagent capability confidence remain larger hardening topics outside this focused repair.

Historical large files such as packages/agent-ui/src/components/chat/ChatMessage.tsx and broad test files remain structural debt; this slice avoided a risky unrelated refactor and kept the touched ChatMessage diff minimal.
Production readiness is still bounded by the existing G004 external signoff requirements for real provider/resource, production backup/rollback, and live restore approval.
